evidence: breakout_long_no_0dte produced 2 STALE_0DTE trades with only $71 PnL, 40.5 PnL/exposure hour, 52.6 minute median hold, and -250.25 worst MAE, while the EXPIRED_0DTE trade was strong but only one sample. This suggests fallback breakout needs stronger ES continuation confirmation rather than broad routing changes.
name: No-0DTE Breakout Quality Holdout
risk: Small sample; stricter ES slope/structure may remove profitable fallback insurance and lower total net profit more than it improves exposure quality.
trigger: 0DTE map missing, stale, thin, or expired with breakout_long_no_0dte routed as ES-only fallback.
validation_metric: No-0DTE fallback PnL/exposure improves, fallback worst MAE does not worsen, VALID_0DTE PnL is unchanged, total net profit remains >=98% of run_001, and completed trades decline <=10%.
